originalTitle: Live Dev - PufferLib is Fixing Reinforcement Learning
title: Refactoring PufferLib Policy API with State Namespace and Tensor Dict
summary: Refactored the policy interface in PufferLib to simplify data passing, replacing tensor dict with a state namespace, reducing code paths and achieving a uniform API that runs and trains successfully. Also discussed hyperparameter sweeps for Adam parameters and viewed Impulse Wars 3D rendering progress.
